what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 SVG line icon showing a clock face with hands and a small revision-style mark near the upper right.
observations: Uses an inline SVG with xmlns, viewBox, fill, stroke, stroke-width, stroke-linecap, and stroke-linejoin attributes.
Draws the clock face as a centered circle with radius 9.
Draws clock hands from 12 to 8, then down to 12, then out to 14.5 13.5.
Draws a separate upper-right angular path from 18 5 to 19 7 to 17 8.
Uses currentColor for stroke so the icon inherits text or parent color.
standouts: The icon combines time indication with a revision/history cue.
The stroke-only styling is themable through currentColor.
conventions: Uses fill="none" with rounded stroke caps and joins.
Keeps geometry inline without metadata, classes, or external references.
concerns: No title or desc metadata if the SVG is used as a standalone accessible image.
notes: A small reusable stroke icon representing revision or history through a clock and upper-right marker.
questions: Is the upper-right angular path intended to read as a revision arrow, a sync marker, or a decorative accent?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename indicates a clock revision icon, and the SVG draws a clock with a revision-style marker.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a reusable currentColor UI icon for revision, history, or time-based change states.
novelty: The revision cue is a short angular mark rather than a full circular arrow.
contribution: Provides a compact clock-and-revision SVG asset with inherited color, stroke-only geometry, and 24x24 icon-system sizing.
summary_for_embedding: This is a 24x24 currentColor SVG line icon depicting a clock face, clock hands, and a small upper-right revision marker.
intention_for_embedding: This was for representing revision, history, or time-related change in a reusable icon set.
